revision.text:

{{nihongo|'''Kuzu Shrine'''|葛神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shōsha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shōsha|WD=Q134917287}}
== described by source (P1343) ==
* {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|WD=Q135037878}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041122064933/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22501
== said to be the same as (P460) ==
* {{ill|Kayanarumino Shrine|lt=Kayanarumino Shrine|WD=Q135039011}}
